type.fr: Commentaire sur les rejets sur le site

comments.comment: Updated US EPA emission factors have been applied to the fuel gas comsumption at the Stoddart Plant, resulting in lower ethylbenzene emission levels.  In addition, ethylbenzene emissions were reduced through lower fuel consumption at the site.

type.fr: Commentaire sur les rejets sur le site

comments.comment: Updated US EPA emission factors have been applied to the fuel gas comsumption at the Stoddart Plant, resulting in lower toluene emission levels.  In addition, toluene emissions were reduced through lower fuel and chemical consumption at the plant.

type.fr: Commentaire sur les rejets sur le site

comments.comment: Updated US EPA emission factors have been applied to the fuel gas comsumption at the Stoddart Plant, resulting in lower n-hexane emission levels.  In addition, n-hexane emissions were reduced through lower fuel consumption at the site.

type.fr: Commentaire sur les rejets sur le site

comments.comment: Updated US EPA emission factors have been applied to the fuel gas comsumption at the Stoddart Plant, resulting in lower xylene emission levels.  In addition, xylene emissions were reduced through lower fuel consumption at the site.

type.fr: Commentaire sur les rejets sur le site

type.fr: Commentaire sur les rejets sur le site

comments.comment: Methanol usage at the Stoddart Plant was greatly reduced during 2000.  The drop in methanol consumption led to a 90 percent reduction in the volume injected underground with the produced water.

type.fr: Commentaire sur les rejets sur le site
